subcodes.first_line: Verses have been sent down in such measure that every soul beholdeth itself powerless to reckon them, and manifest are the evidences [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آیات نازل بشانیکه هر نفسی خود را از احصای آن عاجز مشاهده نماید و بینات ظاهر
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
